content: Backend: Add Gemini vision fallback in sizes.py `_via_eyes` so when Gemma returns vision_disabled/empty, Gemini Flash takes over (mirroring closet flow)
Extension: Extend `_extractHtmlInRect` to capture div-based size charts (role=table/grid + heuristic chart-likeness scan) — fixes AliExpress-style modals
Rebuild extension bundle (yarn build) and refresh dressapp-extension.zip
Verify backend with curl + restart, confirm services healthy
